formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Here's a comprehensive formula sheet for CBSE Class 11 Biology - Plant Kingdom in JSON format:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Determination of Age of Plant by Growth Rings",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Growth rings, age of plant",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "In coniferous trees, growth rings are formed by xylem and phloem. The number of growth rings indicates the age of the plant."
  },
  {
    "name": "Determination of Age of Plant by Cambium Layer",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Cambium layer, age of plant",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Cambium layer is a lateral meristem that is responsible for secondary growth in plants. The thickness of the cambium layer indicates the age of the plant."
  },
  {
    "name": "Law of Root Pressure",
    "formula": "Rate of transpiration = Rate of absorption",
    "variables": "Rate of transpiration, Rate of absorption",
    "units": "mm3/h",
    "notes": "Root pressure is the phenomenon of water being forced out of the roots of a plant. It is caused by the difference in solute concentration between the cytoplasm and the surrounding solution."
  },
  {
    "name": "Darcy's Law (Water Potential)",
    "formula": "Jv = -K \* A \* (Δψw / L)",
    "variables": "Jv (water flux), K (hydraulic conductivity), A (cross-sectional area), Δψw (water potential), L (length)",
    "units": "m/s, m/s, m2, Pa, m",
    "notes": "Darcy's Law relates the rate of water flow through a plant to the water potential gradient."
  },
  {
    "name": "Psychrometer (Wet Bulb and Dry Bulb Thermometer)",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Wet bulb temperature, Dry bulb temperature",
    "units": "°C, °C",
    "notes": "A psychrometer is a device used to measure the rate of evaporation and the humidity of the air. It consists of two thermometers, one wrapped in a wet cloth and the other exposed to the air."
  },
  {
    "name": "Stomatal Index",
    "formula": "Stomatal index = (Number of stomata / Total number of epidermal cells) x 100",
    "variables": "Stomatal index, Number of stomata, Total number of epidermal cells",
    "units": "%",
    "notes": "Stomatal index is a measure of the frequency of stomata on a leaf."
  },
  {
    "name": "Gibberellin (GA) Response in Plants",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Hormone, Plant growth",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Gibberellins are a class of plant hormones that promote stem growth and elongation in plants."
  },
  {
    "name": "AUXIN (IAA) Response in Plants",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Hormone, Plant growth",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Auxins are a class of plant hormones that promote cell elongation and cell division in plants."
  },
  {
    "name": "Ethylene Response in Plants",
    "formula": "",
    "variables": "Hormone, Plant growth",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Ethylene is a plant hormone that promotes fruit ripening and senescence."
  }
]
```

Note: The provided formulas and notes are based on the CBSE Class 11 Biology syllabus and may not be an exhaustive list of all possible formulas related to the Plant Kingdom.
